title: Call attorney for brooke
description: Follow up with attorney regarding Brooke's matter.
completion_notes:
Research completed on finding an attorney to help Brooke with a stalker situation. Key findings:

**Immediate Steps Recommended:**
1. Call VictimConnect Hotline: 1-855-4VICTIM (855-484-2846) — 24/7, anonymous, confidential. They provide referrals to local victim service providers and attorneys.
2. Call the Victim Legal Resource Center: 1-800-VICTIMS (842-8467) — free legal help and advocacy.
3. Visit SPARC (stalkingawareness.org) for education and local provider referrals.

**Legal Options for Brooke:**
- File for a Stalking Protective Order / Restraining Order (can often be done without a lawyer, but having one is recommended especially if the stalker has legal representation)
- File a police report with documented evidence
- An attorney specializing in protective orders can assist with emergency orders and represent at hearings

**Evidence to Preserve Now:**
- Screenshots of messages, social media posts, emails, DMs
- Call logs, voicemails, texts, letters
- Log of dates, times, locations of any threatening interactions
- Witness information

**Finding a Local Attorney:**
- Use Avvo.com or FindLaw.com to search for "stalking victim attorney" or "protective order attorney" in Brooke's area
- Many firms offer free consultations for stalking/harassment cases
- Look for attorneys specializing in family law or victim advocacy

**National Resources:**
- VictimConnect: victimconnect.org | 1-855-484-2846
- SPARC: stalkingawareness.org
- National Center for Victims of Crime: victimsofcrime.org
- Office for Victims of Crime: ovc.ojp.gov/topics/stalking
- National Domestic Violence Hotline: offers support in 200+ languages

comments.text: Find an attorney to help with a stalker
